test_description: Compare the fragment alone against the same fragment with the preceding instructional lines visible.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether local readability falsely masks dependency on omitted earlier material.
why_this_test_matters: This is the central surface trap of SC3.

test_description: Remove all framing that this is hadith explanation and ask whether the owner can still identify the text type correctly.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly says he would not know this is hadith explanation.

test_description: Ask a reviewer what `هذه الأفعال والأقوال` refers to when only the fragment is shown.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Scope over-narrowing caused by omitted earlier material.
why_this_test_matters: This is the most catastrophic local ambiguity in the case.

test_description: Compare exact linked earlier excerpt, openable prior passage, and copy-forward inclusion for the same fragment.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Which recovery mechanism actually restores safe study rather than surface reassurance only.
why_this_test_matters: The owner wants strong recovery, not weak note-only patches.

test_description: Split the earlier instructional material and leave the later scope phrase only in the later fragment; inspect what the earlier excerpts now falsely imply.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly warns that earlier excerpts may miss the governing later line.

test_description: Run the excerpt through the pipeline with and without temporary reassembly and owner-view validation.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether current pipeline gates are sufficient.
why_this_test_matters: The owner identifies missing gates as the deeper failure family.

test_description: Test system behavior under two assumptions: owner knows the larger hadith vs owner knows nothing.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether hidden prior-context assumptions are propping up excerpt acceptance.
why_this_test_matters: Zero-precontext is a foundational owner rule.

test_description: Present A, B, and C against the same case while isolating local readability from safe study.
what_it_is_trying_to_expose: Whether C is being selected only because some words are readable.
why_this_test_matters: The owner warns against confusing partial benefit with acceptable design.

test_description: Let a seemingly readable but under-scoped excerpt proceed downstream and then inspect how later study and taxonomy usage build on it.
why_this_test_matters: The owner explicitly frames this as a decades-worth-of-study risk.
